description: Natural-only over-trigger probe (no exam sibling): operational questions are not build requests, so the intent gate must not fire at all. Guards against the gate (or the intent-recognition skill description) leaking into non-build routing. Calibrated at N=3 (2026-07-08): 3/3 fully green.

conversation.text: What data tables do I have?

processExpectations: The agent answers the data-table question via the data-table tools (or states there are none), without loading the intent-recognition skill.
The agent does not start any build path — no workflow-builder or agent-builder skill loads and no build tools — in response to the question.
